title: The Record Shop at the End of the World
atmospheric_profile: wooden counter with spinning record on turntable, warm lamp, rain on window, old headphones, handwritten note 'For when you need it most' — tactile analog comfort and quiet human connection
quality_notes: Rich, emotionally resonant rail asset. Deepens Marcus Rivera's world with recurring turntable, rain, and handwritten notes. Excellent for Returning Tonight and Late Night Discoveries.
creator_continuity: Marcus Rivera - recurring turntable, rain, handwritten notes, warm lamp light
